Hero.quote: "A smile is the prettiest thing you can wear"
Hero.secondaryHeadline: An Individual Approach To Beauty & Healthy Smiles
Hero.description: Strengthening your confidence through comfortable, personalized treatments led by Dr. Salome Tsiskarava.

aesthetic.title: Aesthetic Dentistry
aesthetic.description: Premium whitening and veneers for a flawless, confident smile.

implantology.title: Implantology
implantology.description: State-of-the-art dental implants to restore full function and aesthetics.

orthodontics.title: Orthodontics
orthodontics.description: Modern alignment solutions including braces and clear aligners.

hygiene.title: Professional Hygiene
hygiene.description: Deep cleaning and preventive care for optimal oral health.

restorative.title: Restorative Dentistry
restorative.description: Advanced procedures to recover the natural beauty and strength of teeth.

pediatric.title: Pediatric Dentistry
pediatric.description: Gentle, comfortable care tailored specifically for children.

About.description: Our core philosophy is an individual approach to every patient. We focus on both the aesthetic beauty and the fundamental health of your smile, ensuring a comfortable, anxiety-free treatment environment that empowers you.

BeforeAfter.caption: Our transformation procedures are designed to restore not just your smile, but your confidence.
